01.title: Jigawa Rice Milling Hub.
01.challenge: Gwaram processing clusters relied exclusively on fossil fuels. Diesel costs exceeding ₦1,200/liter eroded SME margins by 45%. Meanwhile, the local mini-grid suffered from low daytime utilization, threatening its long-term viability.
01.solution: AgAsset Co deployed 5 industrial-grade electric rice hullers through a lease-to-own structure. These machines act as Anchor Loads, providing the grid with consistent daytime demand while slashing energy costs for the processors.
01.outcome: 100% clean energy transition across the hub. Average processor income has increased by 35% within the first 6 months of operation.

specs.label: Financing Model
specs.details: A structured financing arrangement where SMEs pay off the asset through daily or weekly installments aligned with their production cycles. Title transfers upon final payment.

specs.label: Credit Enhancement
specs.details: Automated risk mitigation via integrated firmware that allows for remote asset immobilization in the event of default, reducing the need for physical collateral.

specs.label: Current Ownership
specs.details: Assets are held within a Ring-Fenced SPV to ensure investor protection and balance sheet optimization during the repayment lifecycle.

specs.label: Equipment Profile
specs.details: Equipped with high-efficiency copper-wound motors designed for continuous operation in high-temperature environments, maximizing throughput.

specs.label: Grid Integration
specs.details: Fully integrated into the local mini-grid with smart metering that allows for real-time load synchronization and daytime energy optimization.

specs.label: Daily Runtime
specs.details: Operational schedule curated to coincide with peak photovoltaic generation, minimizing strain on battery storage and ensuring lowest energy costs.

metrics.label: Income Increase
metrics.desc: Net growth in processor profit margins.

metrics.label: Daily Output
metrics.desc: Tons of rice processed per single shift.

metrics.label: Fuel Displaced
metrics.desc: Liters of diesel removed from the cycle.

metrics.label: Jobs Created
metrics.desc: New direct processing and logistics roles.

03.title: Eleuma PUE Hub.
03.challenge: In many emerging markets, operators of income-generating activities are hindered by labor-intensive manual processes or expensive diesel-powered machinery. These traditional methods result in significant time loss and limited productivity, stifling the economic growth of rural communities and operators.
03.solution: The project deploys Productive Use Equipment (PUE), such as agricultural millers and water pumps, powered by renewable energy sources like solar mini-grids. By switching to electric sources, operators significantly reduce labor and processing time while enhancing productivity, output capacity, and daily revenue.
03.outcome: Two PUE units deployed across two sites with ₦70m in structured lease-to-own financing. Operators achieved a 5x increase in daily output and revenue within the first quarter of operation.

specs.label: Financing Model
specs.details: A structured financing arrangement where operators pay off equipment through installments aligned with their production cycles. Title transfers upon final payment.

specs.label: Credit Enhancement
specs.details: Automated risk mitigation via integrated firmware allowing remote asset immobilization in the event of default, reducing the need for physical collateral.

specs.label: Current Ownership
specs.details: Assets are held within a ring-fenced SPV to ensure investor protection and balance sheet optimization during the repayment lifecycle.

specs.label: Equipment Profile
specs.details: Electric agricultural millers and water pumps replacing diesel-powered equivalents, engineered for continuous operation on solar mini-grid power supply.

specs.label: Energy Source
specs.details: Equipment integrated into existing solar mini-grid infrastructure, providing consistent clean energy and acting as anchor productive loads for daytime generation.

specs.label: Daily Runtime
specs.details: Operational schedule curated to coincide with peak photovoltaic generation, minimizing battery storage strain and ensuring the lowest effective energy cost.

metrics.label: Output Increase
metrics.desc: Increase in daily processing output and revenue per operator.

metrics.label: Financing (₦)
metrics.desc: Total lease-to-own financing deployed across both sites.

metrics.label: Sites Active
metrics.desc: PUE units commissioned across two operator locations.

metrics.label: Diesel Displaced
metrics.desc: Full transition from fossil fuel to solar-powered operations.

timeline.title: Origination
timeline.desc: Feasibility study and equipment vendor selection.

timeline.title: Deployment
timeline.desc: Installation of PUE units across two operator sites.

timeline.title: Operations
timeline.desc: Output tracking, repayment monitoring, and utilization optimization.

02.title: Kaduna Cold Chain Facility.
02.challenge: Over 50% of tomato harvests in Zaria were lost within 48 hours due to extreme heat and zero cooling capacity. Farmers were forced to sell at "distress prices" to avoid total loss.
02.solution: Deployment of 10 modular blast-cooling units powered by an integrated off-grid solar array. This allows farmers to preserve produce for up to 21 days while waiting for better market prices.
02.outcome: Post-harvest spoilage reduced from 55% to less than 4%. Local market price stability improved by 22% during peak harvest cycles.

specs.label: Financing Model
specs.details: Users pay a small transaction fee per crate of produce stored, removing all upfront costs for farmers while generating consistent cashflow.

specs.label: Thermal Storage
specs.details: Advanced cooling tech that stores 'cold' in specialized phase-change materials, allowing for temperature maintenance overnight without battery drain.

specs.label: Asset Type
specs.details: Scalable modular units that can be transported and commissioned within 72 hours, designed for rapid deployment in high-yield agriculture zones.

specs.label: Energy Source
specs.details: Dedicated solar array with lithium-ion backup ensures 24/7 climate control independently of the unreliable local power grid.

specs.label: Temp Control
specs.details: Ultra-precise thermostat controls maintaining produce at optimal metabolic dormancy to extend shelf life without freezing damage.

specs.label: SME Access
specs.details: Digital reservation system where cooperatives can book cooling space in advance, optimizing facility utilization and farmer schedules.

metrics.label: Monthly Capacity
metrics.desc: Tons processed through the Zaria node.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.desc: Planning for 5 additional nodes in Kaduna.
